overview: A web-based travel planning platform where users discover destinations, build day-wise itineraries, and manage saved trips — all from one clean, personalized dashboard.
features: User accounts with Internet Identity login
Searchable destination catalog with filters by location, budget, and rating
Trip creation with dates, budget, and travel interests
Day-by-day itinerary builder with add/edit activities
Personalized dashboard showing saved trips and upcoming travel
Destination detail pages with activities and estimated budgets
Fully responsive design for mobile, tablet, and desktop
